title: Google Gemini access denied due to IP blocking
symptom: When attempting to send a request to the Google Gemini API, a '403 Forbidden' error is returned, indicating that access is denied. This issue occurs only in the self-hosted N8N instance.
root_cause: Similar to the BigQuery issue, Google has blocked access from certain IP addresses associated with Hetzner, preventing successful API calls to services like Gemini. This is a recurring problem for users on the same infrastructure.
fix_steps: Alternatively, migrate your N8N instance to a different hosting provider like AWS
agent_instruction: Disable IPv6 and reserve a floating IPv4 address or migrate to a different hosting provider.
